quiet_hours_complete.name: quiet_hours_complete
quiet_hours_complete.value:
"notification_prefs"."quiet_hours_enabled" = FALSE OR (
      "notification_prefs"."quiet_hours_start" IS NOT NULL AND
      "notification_prefs"."quiet_hours_end" IS NOT NULL AND
      "notification_prefs"."quiet_hours_tz" IS NOT NULL
    )
